description: Composition Blue denim shorts made of 72% cotton, 26.5% polyester and 1.5% spandex, above knee length, has fading on thighs and back, a zip and button closure, belt loops on waistband, two front pockets with one change pocket, two patch pockets on back with embroidery and distressed detailing and a silver brand patch on back waistband Comes with a scarf as a belt Fit Regular Wash care Machine or hand wash seperately with mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Look funky and fashionable in these shorts from jealous 21. Perfect to wear on a fun day out with friends, pop it on with your favourite colourful tee and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
